summary: Set 024 Session 1 (single-session, final): Removed the Provider Queues and Provider Heartbeats tree views from the Dabbler AI Orchestration extension. Deleted six source files (ProviderQueuesProvider.ts, ProviderHeartbeatsProvider.ts, queueActions.ts, providerQueues.test.ts, providerHeartbeats.test.ts, pythonRunner.ts) totaling ~1,735 LOC. Stripped two views, five commands, four menus contributions, and six configuration properties from package.json. Removed the provider-related wiring from extension.ts (~105 lines: createTreeView calls, setInterval auto-refresh, onDidChangeConfiguration listeners, registerQueueActionCommands). Simplified installAiRouterCommands.ts resolvePythonPath() to a two-tier chain (dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath -> 'python'); removed the dabblerProviderQueues.pythonPath fallback that was orphaned by the schema removal. Truncated installAiRouter.test.ts to drop the five provider-related suites (35/35 install-only suites still pass via mocha CLI in isolation). Trimmed a stale JSDoc reference to runPythonModule in aiRouterInstall.ts. Bumped extension to v0.13.14 (package.json, package-lock.json, CHANGELOG.md, CLAUDE.md); CHANGELOG entry has Removed + Migration subsections documenting (a) disappearing views, (b) disappearing commands, (c) disappearing settings, (d) pythonPath fallback removal, (e) the rename path for operators using the old key. `npm run compile` and `npx tsc --outDir out` both exit 0. Modified installAiRouter.test.ts runs 35/35 via mocha. Cross-provider verification (gpt-5-4, session-verification) returned SAFE TO SHIP across all six questions; two non-blocking refinements raised (lock-in test deferred as out-of-scope; CHANGELOG migration sentence applied in-session). Verification cost: $0.1394. The Python CLI surface (ai_router.queue_status, ai_router.heartbeat_status) stays for operators running outsource-last in other repos; the shared dabblerSessionSetsContainer activity-bar container stays for the Session Sets view. Net diff: -943 insertions / -6180 deletions across 44 files (includes out/ and dist/ build artifacts that are tracked in this repo).
